# ps1-programmer-tool-archive-packet

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Target | ps1-programmer-tool |
| Status | planned |
| Task type | build-archive-packet |

## Public Notes

Build the PS1 Programmer's Tool packet around SDevTC, Net Yaroze documentation, runtime-library references, and PSn00bSDK clean-room compatibility.

## Inputs

- public documentation records
- runtime-library metadata
- PSn00bSDK source records

## Outputs

- standalone archival packet
- toolchain dependency map
- clean-room compatibility notes

## Blocked By

- ps1-programmer-tool-triage
